tab1.title: Details
tab1.content:
• Basil leaves are aromatic herbs_culinary_leaves widely used in cooking.
  • They have a sweet and slightly spicy flavor.
  • Used in Italian and Indian cuisines.
  • Often added fresh to dishes.
  • Known for medicinal benefits.

tab1.title: Details
tab1.content:
• Bay leaves are dried leaves used for flavoring dishes.
  • They have a strong aroma.
  • Used in soups, curries, and stews.
  • Removed before serving.
  • Common in global cuisines.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: • Not eaten directly due to tough texture.

tab1.title: Details
tab1.content:
• Chives are thin green herbs_culinary_leaves with a mild onion flavor.
  • Used in salads and garnishing.
  • Popular in Western cuisine.
  • Best used fresh.
  • Delicate in taste.

tab1.title: Details
tab1.content:
• Coriander leaves are widely used as garnish and flavoring.
  • They have a fresh citrus-like taste.
  • Common in Indian and global cuisines.
  • Used in chutneys and salads.
  • Adds aroma to dishes.

tab1.title: Details
tab1.content:
• Curry leaves are aromatic herbs_culinary_leaves used in Indian cooking.
  • They add a distinct flavor to dishes.
  • Used in tempering and curries.
  • Have medicinal properties.
  • Essential in South Indian cuisine.

tab1.title: Details
tab1.content:
• Dill leaves are aromatic herbs_culinary_leaves with a fresh flavor.
  • Used in salads, soups, and pickles.
  • Popular in European cuisine.
  • Often used fresh.
  • Nutritious and flavorful.

tab1.title: Details
tab1.content:
• Lemongrass is a fragrant herb with a citrus flavor.
  • Used in soups, teas, and curries.
  • Popular in Asian cuisine.
  • Used fresh or dried.
  • Highly aromatic.

tab1.title: Details
tab1.content:
• Mint leaves are refreshing herbs_culinary_leaves with a cooling effect.
  • Used in drinks, chutneys, and dishes.
  • Popular worldwide.
  • Also used medicinally.
  • Provides fresh aroma.

tab1.title: Details
tab1.content:
• Oregano is a strong-flavored herb used in cooking.
  • Common in Italian dishes.
  • Used in pizzas and sauces.
  • Highly aromatic.
  • Used dried or fresh.

tab1.title: Details
tab1.content:
• Parsley is a widely used herb for garnish and flavor.
  • It has a mild peppery taste.
  • Used in salads and sauces.
  • Common in global cuisine.
  • Highly nutritious.

tab1.title: Details
tab1.content:
• Rosemary is a woody herb with strong aroma.
  • Used in roasted dishes and meats.
  • Popular in Mediterranean cuisine.
  • Used fresh or dried.
  • Has medicinal properties.

tab1.title: Details
tab1.content:
• Sage is an aromatic herb with a slightly bitter taste.
  • Used in savory dishes.
  • Popular in European cuisine.
  • Used fresh or dried.
  • Known for medicinal uses.

tab1.title: Details
tab1.content:
• Tarragon is a herb with a slightly sweet and licorice-like flavor.
  • Used in sauces and salads.
  • Popular in French cuisine.
  • Used fresh or dried.
  • Highly aromatic.

tab1.title: Details
tab1.content:
• Thyme is a small aromatic herb used in cooking.
  • It has a strong earthy flavor.
  • Used in soups and meats.
  • Popular in Mediterranean cuisine.
  • Also used medicinally.
